problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bioelectrochemical. Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
